message:
fix(random): reject choice() from empty array when size > 0

Previously choice([], size=N, replace=true) would panic on the modulo
operation inside the sampling loop. Add an early check returning
InvalidUpperBound when the input array is empty and a non-zero number
of samples is requested, matching NumPy's ValueError behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
